turns.content: Do not rewrite core architecture. Preserve the auth/session boundary, keep command handling bounded, and require tests for behavior changes.
We are improving a long-running coding assistant session. Keep changes incremental, preserve architecture, and do not skip tests.

First target: improve retry handling around transient request failures without rewriting the router.
I will start with a bounded retry change and keep tests visible.
Also keep type safety intact and do not touch src/critical/router.ts.
I will leave src/critical/router.ts alone and keep type safety intact.
Later we also want clearer session-expiry messaging, but not by rewriting auth core.
I can keep that separate and avoid auth-core rewrites.
